mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voj_languages (language_id, language_slug, language_name, language_compile_command, language_run_command, language_enabled, language_source_filename, language_time_multiplier, language_memory_multiplier) VALUES (#{languageId}, #{languageSlug}, #{languageName}, #{compileCommand}, #{runCommand}, #{enabled}, #{sourceFilename}, #{timeMultiplier}, #{memoryMultiplier})
